name: JMRI MCP
description: MCP server for JMRI - voice/chat control of DCC model railroads

jmri_url.title: JMRI Server URL
jmri_url.description: URL of your JMRI Web Server

exhibition_password.title: Exhibition Mode Password
exhibition_password.description: Password required to exit exhibition mode (a restricted, public-demo-safe mode). Leave blank to use the default password 'this is sparta'.

exhibition_allowed_addresses.title: Exhibition Mode Allowed DCC Addresses
exhibition_allowed_addresses.description: Comma-separated DCC addresses locomotives are restricted to while exhibition mode is on, e.g. '4,5,6'. Leave blank to allow any address.

exhibition_start_on.title: Start Already in Exhibition Mode
exhibition_start_on.description: If enabled, the server starts already in exhibition mode instead of requiring a spoken/typed command to enter it.
